plugins.name: langguard-arbiter
plugins.description: In-harness agent policy enforcement for OpenAI Codex. Screens, enforces, and evidences every MCP tool call at the pre-action seam (PreToolUse) against your LangGuard policies — deterministic ALLOW / DENY via a session-local policy daemon, no LLM in the enforcement loop. ASK collapses to DENY (Codex has no interactive approval path from a hook); approval happens in LangGuard. Requires Codex CLI 0.124.0+ and Node.js on PATH.
